impact: Recent failures shifted from SyntaxError to ModuleNotFoundError because the daemon selected a test-only import guard before the target module existed. This repair tells the supervisor to treat that as task-ordering drift, park the impossible retry, and require a sentinel module or combined sentinel-plus-test recovery before retrying the import guard.
summary: Strengthen supervisor recovery guidance for impossible syntax-first import retries.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 4 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
